chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 123 of 2021 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1.For order on office objection/reply as at A 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of CMA No.1433/21 (stay) 31.10.2023 None for Appellant Mr. Akhtar Ali Memon, Advocate for Respondent Nos.1 and 2......... Impugned Order is in relation of an Administration Suit wherein some frivolous applications were dismissed when the suit was finally disposed of. None is in attendance for Appellant. The Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
